news:news.news:title: Tensions escalate between the US and Iran amid the search for a missing airman, while global events impact fuel supplies and security in various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran relations, Ukraine conflict, global fuel shortages, Cameroon's political changes, mafia arrests in Italy

news:news.news:title: Rising global tensions, particularly the war in Iran, are driving up prices and creating uncertainty in various sectors, including energy and consumer goods.
news:news.news:keywords: US jobs market analysis, impact of Iran war on prices, Ticketmaster fee controversy, Hershey recipe dispute, private credit market concerns

news:news.news:title: AI-generated content raises copyright concerns as a folk musician faces unauthorized uploads of her songs.
news:news.news:keywords: AI and copyright issues, Nintendo Switch game sale, AR gaming glasses features, Anker Nebula P1 projector review, OpenAI leadership changes

news:news.news:title: UConn's Geno Auriemma apologized for an emotional outburst during a Final Four game, while the Lakers face a setback with Austin Reaves out for the season.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Final Four updates, Geno Auriemma apology, Lakers injury news, UCLA national title game preparation, Deontay Wilder boxing victory

news:news.news:title: A new blood pressure treatment shows promise for patients unresponsive to standard therapies, while discoveries in astronomy and biology reveal significant insights into the universe and life origins.
news:news.news:keywords: medical breakthroughs in blood pressure treatment, gene therapy for hearing restoration, astronomical discoveries about dying stars, ancient life origins and meteor impacts, role of brain cells in PTSD

news:news.news:title: Rescue efforts in Iran for a US crew member face significant challenges, while Hungary prepares for a pivotal election against Viktor Orban's long-standing leadership.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran rescue operations, Hungary elections 2026, Cuba prisoner release, Burkina Faso military leadership, France Muslim gathering court ruling

news:news.news:title: The US jobs market showed positive growth in March, but concerns remain over the impact of rising oil prices and corporate fee increases.
news:news.news:keywords: US jobs market performance, impact of oil prices on economy, corporate fee increases and consumer backlash, private credit market confidence, Trump's tariffs on pharmaceuticals

news:news.news:title: Anthropic's new policy significantly increases costs for users of OpenClaw with Claude AI, while other tech developments include NASA fixing an Outlook glitch and OpenAI's CEO taking medical leave.
news:news.news:keywords: AI subscription cost changes, NASA technical issues, OpenAI leadership changes, gaming hardware price increases, Apple Watch health technology impact

news:news.news:title: Geno Auriemma criticized officiating after UConn's loss, while UCLA reached its first NCAA title game and Cooper Flagg became the youngest player with a 50-point NBA game.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Women's Basketball Final Four, NBA Rookie Records, Giannis Antetokounmpo Health Investigation, Luka Doncic Injury Update, WNBA Expansion Draft Highlights

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific advancements include a gene therapy for deafness, insights into aging and immune response, and a new microwave technique for healthier fries.
news:news.news:keywords: gene therapy for hearing restoration, impact of aging on immune response, ancient life discoveries, healthier cooking techniques, space exploration advancements

news:news.news:title: US Job Growth Surges Amid Rising Oil Prices and Tensions in Ukraine and Iran
Iran Struggles to Rescue US Crew as Hungary Prepares for Orban's Election Showdown
